findings.message: TASK-02 skip path sets draftCreated=false which causes determineThreadStatus to regress thread to pending. Need to set draftCreated=true when preserving edited/approved drafts.
TASK-03 under-tests: missing approved and sent draft scenarios.
Summary says 'two tests' but TASK-03 now scopes five scenarios.

rounds.action: Addressed: fixed draftCreated logic, added TC-04/TC-05 to TASK-03, updated summary.

findings.message: Skip path under-specifies metadata preservation: draftTemplateSubject/draftQualityPassed would point at discarded generation.
draftCreated=true on skip path would emit false drafted telemetry event. Need draftIsNew boolean.

rounds.action: Addressed: added draftIsNew boolean, explicit metadata preservation, fixed summary.
